id.description: The store hash, a unique store identifier.

account_uuid.description: The UUID of the account to which the store belongs.

control_panel_base_url.description: The secure hostname of the control panel.

first_name.description: Primary contact’s first name (as defined during the store sign-up process).

last_name.description: Primary contact’s last name (as defined during the store sign-up process).

country.description: Country where the store is located (as defined during the store sign-up process).

admin_email.description: Email address of the store administrator/owner.

order_email.description: Email address for orders and fulfillment.

currency_symbol.description: Default symbol for values in the currency.

decimal_separator.description: Default decimal separator for values in the currency.

thousands_separator.description: Default thousands separator for values in the currency.

decimal_places.description: Default decimal places for values in the currency.

currency_symbol_location.description: Default position of the currency symbol (left or right).

dimension_decimal_token.description: The symbol that separates the whole numbers from the decimal points.

dimension_thousands_token.description: The symbol used to denote thousands.

plan_name.description: Name of the BigCommerce plan to which this store is subscribed.

plan_level.description: Level of the BigCommerce plan to which this store is subscribed.

plan_is_trial.description: Whether the payment plan associated with the store is still in the trial phase.

industry.description: Industry, or vertical category, in which the business operates. (As selected from drop-down list during the store sign-up process.)

logo.description: Either an object describing the logo image, or an empty array.

is_price_entered_with_tax.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether or not prices are entered with tax.

store_id.description: The numeric ID of the store. This is a different unique ID than the store hash.

default_channel_id.description: The ID of the default channel. The ID of the first hosted storefront created on the store is `1`.

default_site_id.description: The BigCommerce ID of the website associated with the default storefront.

features.description: Describes some aspects of the storeʼs tech stack and configuration settings that affect the features available for the store to use.

stencil_enabled.description: Indicates whether a store is using a Stencil theme.

sitewidehttps_enabled.description: Indicates whether there is site-wide https.

facebook_catalog_id.description: The ID of the Facebook by Meta catalog. If there is none, this endpoint returns an empty string.

checkout_type.description: What type of checkout is enabled on the store. Possible values returned are optimized, single (one page), single_customizable (one page for developers), klarna.

graphql_storefront_api_enabled.description: Describes whether you can use the [GraphQL Storefront API](/graphql-storefront/reference) on this store.

shopper_consent_tracking_enabled.description: Indicates whether the store is tracking the values of the cookie and privacy consent settings that the shopper consented to and configured.

multi_storefront_enabled.description: Indicates whether the storeʼs plan provides the possibility of using more than one storefront or sales channel. Internally, this value indicates whether the store has the MSF feature flag enabled.

active.description: Describes the number of storefronts active on the store. If `multi_storefront_enabled` is `false`, this value is `1`.

total_including_inactive.description: Describes the total number of storefronts associated with the store, including both active and inactive storefronts. The default varies based on store plan.
